text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory and I take a walk along the river
after we finish the day's training.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... I'm literally dying!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
You want to take a break already, Jordan?
C'mon, just a little more.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Seriously?! We've been running for, like, a whole
hour! Anyone's legs would hurt!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Well... you're not wrong. I'll go on ahead, okay?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
But y'know, nothing gets me going like running
with my bestie.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
...!
Geez... How can you say stuff like that so
casually?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Fiiiine, guess break time's over. Lead on and I'm
with you all the way!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Look at that passion! Two rivals building each
other up on the riverbank!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I want to run with them!
choice_data_list: You've already had a long day, so let's hold off.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Yesss! I'll be back!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Hey, you two! Lemme in on the fun!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
So what's the plan? Run off into the sunset,
collapse into a field and talk about what good
friends we are?!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Not at all! We're just running!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
...I see. You're saying words aren't necessary when
it comes to true friendship, huh?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Uh, no?! Are you messing with me or are we, like, not communicating at all?!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Haha, she's always like this in the evenings. ...But
hey, laying down after our run sounds pretty chill,
doesn't it?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: All right! Let's head for the sunset!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory and her friends work up a sweat
and run until the sun goes down.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: What?! You're really saying no?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Come on, don't be mean! I've just gotta run!
choice_data_list:
You should save that energy for our next
training session.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Ngh! So I have no choice but to hold back for
today?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
...Okay, I understand. But it's all coming out next
time we train!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory looks on enviously as the other
two run off.
